infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: In-dependent Living uses the camera to scan prescription bottle labels and barcodes so your medications can be added automatically.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone access is required by the camera system.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: In-dependent Living uses your photo library so caregivers can upload a profile photo for their loved one.

plugins.cameraPermission: In-dependent Living uses the camera to scan prescription bottle labels and barcodes.

plugins.photosPermission: In-dependent Living uses your photo library so caregivers can upload a profile photo for their loved one.
